ITR-1.title: Log in to incometax.gov.in
ITR-1.portalPath: Home → Login with PAN + password or Aadhaar OTP
screenTips: Use the same PAN as your Form 16 and AIS — mismatched PAN blocks prefill.
Enable two-factor authentication before starting data entry.
warnings: Never share OTP or password with third parties claiming to file for you.
Use only https://www.incometax.gov.in — check the padlock in your browser.

fields.label: PAN (User ID)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Your government login ID must match the PAN on this return.
fields.whyWeAsk: The portal authenticates you by PAN before showing any prefill or ITR forms.
validationTips: PAN is 10 characters: five letters, four digits, one letter.
Use uppercase; the portal usually accepts either case.

fields.label: Password or Aadhaar OTP
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Complete login yourself — we never store or enter your portal credentials.
fields.whyWeAsk: Only you should authenticate on the official portal.
validationTips: If OTP fails, wait 30 seconds before requesting a new one.
Reset password via 'Forgot Password' if locked out.

ITR-1.title: Download prefill and confirm AIS
screenTips: Download prefill before entering salary — it pulls Form 26AS/AIS TDS credits.
Compare prefill TDS totals with our computed taxes-paid figures.
warnings: Prefill can be incomplete — always verify against Form 16 and broker statements.
Do not submit until every schedule matches your documents.

fields.label: Download pre-filled JSON / XML
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Prefill saves time but must be reconciled with your LastMinute summary.
fields.whyWeAsk: Government prefill pulls employer and bank TDS — starting here reduces manual typing.
validationTips: After download, note TDS salary and TDS other totals for cross-check with our guide.
If prefill shows wrong employer, update AIS feedback before filing.

fields.label: Select ITR-1 (Sahaj)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Pick the form our engine recommended for your income mix.
fields.whyWeAsk: Wrong form selection causes validation errors or missed schedules.
validationTips: ITR-1 applies to salary, one house, and other sources within limits.
If you have capital gains or foreign income, stop and switch to ITR-2.

fields.label: Tax regime (old vs new)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Regime choice locks which deductions apply for this assessment year.
fields.whyWeAsk: Old vs new regime changes every deduction field downstream.
validationTips: Set regime before entering Chapter VI-A deductions.
Default new regime opt-out requires explicit old regime selection.

ITR-1.title: Salary details
ITR-1.portalPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
screenTips: Open Form 16 Part B beside this screen — enter annual totals only.
warnings: Do not type rounded lakh values from memory; copy exact rupee amounts.
If Form 16 has multiple rows, use total annual values, not monthly.

fields.label: Gross salary u/s 17(1)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Base salary drives taxable salary and downstream tax.
fields.whyWeAsk: This is the starting point for salary tax — portal validates against Form 16 TDS.
validationTips: Match Form 16 'Gross Salary' line — not net pay credited to bank.
Exclude employer PF if already shown separately per Form 16.

fields.label: Exempt allowances u/s 10 (HRA/LTA)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: This keeps exempt allowances out of taxable income.
fields.whyWeAsk: HRA/LTA exemptions reduce taxable salary when old regime and proofs exist.
validationTips: HRA exemption requires rent receipts for old regime.
LTA is exempt only for eligible travel — keep tickets.

fields.label: Standard deduction u/s 16(ia)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Portal should match computed standard deduction exactly.
fields.whyWeAsk: Standard deduction is automatic for salaried — wrong amount triggers mismatch.
validationTips: Do not add standard deduction twice (Form 16 may already net it).
Use our computed value — cap changes by assessment year.

fields.label: Professional tax u/s 16(iii)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Only deducted professional tax should be entered.
fields.whyWeAsk: Professional tax paid by employer is deductible from salary income.
validationTips: Max ₹2,500 per year — match Form 16 deduction line.
Enter zero if employer did not deduct professional tax.

fields.label: Agricultural income field
fields.plainEnglishWhy: For this scope path, leave empty when there is no agricultural income.
fields.whyWeAsk: Agricultural income is exempt but may affect slab rate if above threshold.
validationTips: Leave blank unless you have documented agricultural income.

ITR-1.title: Deductions and tax benefits
screenTips: Confirm tax regime toggle before entering any deduction amount.
warnings: Do not re-enter 80C sub-items if portal auto-sums from detailed schedule.
Entering old-regime only deductions in wrong regime causes mismatch.

fields.label: Section 80C
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Use capped final 80C amount, not raw investment sum.
fields.whyWeAsk: 80C reduces taxable income in old regime — portal caps at ₹1.5 lakh.
validationTips: Enter capped total after ELSS, PPF, LIC limits.
Skip or zero in new regime.

fields.label: Section 80D
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Health insurance deduction impacts final tax payable.
fields.whyWeAsk: Medical insurance premiums for self/parents reduce tax in old regime.
validationTips: Keep premium receipts and policy copy.
Senior citizen parents allow higher limits.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(1B)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Additional NPS deduction is separate from 80C.
fields.whyWeAsk: Extra ₹50,000 NPS contribution has its own field — do not bundle into 80C.
validationTips: Requires NPS transaction statement.
Available in both regimes when eligible.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(2)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Employer NPS has a separate field and limit treatment.
fields.whyWeAsk: Employer NPS contribution is deductible within statutory limits.
validationTips: Match Form 16 employer NPS line if present.

fields.label: Section 80G
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Use computed eligible donation value after limits.
fields.whyWeAsk: Donations to approved charities reduce tax in old regime only.
validationTips: Keep donation receipt with 80G registration number.
Enter eligible amount after donee-specific limits.

fields.label: Section 80U
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Select No when disability deduction is not applicable.
fields.whyWeAsk: Disability deduction requires medical certificate — select No if not claimed.
validationTips: Selecting Yes without certificate triggers scrutiny.

fields.label: Section 80TTA / 80TTB toggle
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Deselect any default selection if your computed value is zero.
fields.whyWeAsk: Savings interest deduction applies only when interest income exists.
validationTips: 80TTB for seniors replaces 80TTA — pick the correct section.
Deselect portal default when our value is zero.

ITR-1.title: Validate and preview
screenTips: Run portal validation before submit — fix errors in the schedule it names.
Compare net tax payable on preview with our summary.
warnings: Validation errors often point to a specific schedule — fix there, not in Part D only.
Preview PDF is not filed until you click Submit.

fields.label: Click Validate on portal
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Portal validation catches arithmetic and cross-schedule mismatches.
fields.whyWeAsk: Validation is mandatory before submit — it surfaces missing schedules.
validationTips: Note each error code and schedule name.
Re-run validate after every fix.

fields.label: Net tax payable / refund (sanity check)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Preview should match our computed net payable within rounding.
fields.whyWeAsk: Large variance means a missed schedule or wrong regime.
validationTips: Difference under ₹100 may be rounding — larger gaps need schedule review.
Check TDS credit schedule if refund looks too high.

ITR-1.title: Submit and e-verify
screenTips: Refund processing starts only after successful e-verification.
warnings: Return is not complete until e-verified within the statutory window.
Aadhaar OTP is the fastest e-verify method for most residents.

fields.label: Submit return on portal
fields.plainEnglishWhy: You submit on incometax.gov.in — we guide only.
fields.whyWeAsk: Submission locks the return for this assessment year.
validationTips: Double-check bank account for refund credit.
Save acknowledgement number.

fields.label: E-verify (Aadhaar OTP / net banking)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: E-verification completes filing — without it the return is invalid.
fields.whyWeAsk: ITD requires e-verify within 30 days of filing.
validationTips: Aadhaar must be linked to PAN for OTP method.
If OTP fails, try net banking e-verify.

ITR-2.title: Salary (if applicable)
ITR-2.portalPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
warnings: Skip the entire salary schedule if you had no employer salary this year.
Investors with only capital gains should not enter salary fields.

fields.label: Gross salary u/s 17(1)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Enter only when Form 16 exists; otherwise skip this schedule.

fields.label: Exempt allowances u/s 10 (HRA/LTA)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Match Form 16 exempt totals when salary is present.

fields.label: Standard deduction u/s 16(ia)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Required when salary head is active; copy exact computed amount.

fields.label: Net salary income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Verify portal net salary matches our head total.

fields.label: Entire salary schedule
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip all salary rows when gross salary is zero in our summary.

ITR-2.title: Capital gains schedule
warnings: Use broker tax P&L or capital gains statement — not sale proceeds alone.
LTCG u/s 112A exemption of ₹1.25L is applied before entering taxable LTCG.

fields.label: STCG u/s 111A (listed equity/MF)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Listed equity short-term gains taxed at 15% — net after set-off.

fields.label: LTCG u/s 112A (listed equity/MF)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Net LTCG on listed equity before the ₹1.25L exemption — the portal applies the exemption itself.

fields.label: STCG on other assets (slab rate)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Short-term gains on property, gold, debt funds, unlisted shares — taxed at your slab rate.

fields.label: LTCG on other assets (property, gold, debt MF)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Long-term gains outside 112A use special rates — enter net taxable amount.

fields.label: Presumptive business u/s 44AD
fields.plainEnglishWhy: ITR-2 has no presumptive business schedule — use ITR-4 if applicable.

fields.label: Schedule FA (foreign assets)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip unless our profile flags foreign assets — expert review recommended.

ITR-2.title: Schedule 112A — listed shares & equity MF
screenTips: If you sold shares bought on or before 31 Jan 2018, the portal asks scrip-wise details — one row per stock or fund.
Use your broker's Tax P&L or capital gains statement — not just the sale amount from your bank.
warnings: Grandfathering uses 31 Jan 2018 fair market value — wrong cost inflates tax.
STT must have been paid on sale for 112A LTCG treatment.

fields.label: Taxable LTCG u/s 112A (after ₹1.25L exemption)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: After entering scrip-wise rows, the portal total should match this net taxable figure.

fields.label: STCG u/s 111A (listed equity)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Short-term listed equity gains taxed at 15% — enter net after intra-head set-off.

fields.label: Scrip-wise sale rows
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Add each sale: ISIN, sale date, sale value, purchase cost, FMV on 31-Jan-2018 if bought earlier.

ITR-2.title: Loss set-off & carry forward (CYLA · BFLA · CFL)
screenTips: CYLA = losses this year set against income this year.
BFLA = old losses from previous years set against this year's income.
CFL = what's left to carry to next year — save this schedule for future filing.
warnings: Speculative (intraday) losses can only set off speculative gains — not salary.
House property loss can set off other heads up to ₹2 lakh; rest carries forward.
File on time — losses from a year cannot be carried forward if that year's return was filed late.

fields.label: Current year loss set-off (CYLA total)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Portal auto-computes CYLA — verify it matches our summary after you enter all income heads.

fields.label: Brought-forward loss used (BFLA)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Enter prior-year STCL/LTCL/HP loss figures from last year's CFL schedule first.

fields.label: STCL carried forward to next year
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Short-term capital loss remaining after set-off — usable against future STCG for 8 years.

fields.label: LTCL carried forward to next year
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Long-term capital loss remaining — set off only against future LTCG for 8 years.

fields.label: House property loss carried forward
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Loss from let-out property beyond ₹2L set-off limit — carries for 8 years.

fields.label: Business loss carried forward
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Unabsorbed business loss — carries for 8 years (ITR-2 rarely; ITR-3 traders see this).

ITR-2.title: Other sources income
warnings: Cross-check FD and dividend lines with AIS before entering.
Enter gross savings interest before 80TTA/80TTB deduction.

fields.label: FD / term deposit interest
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Fully taxable interest — must match 26AS TDS credits.

fields.label: Savings account interest (gross)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Enter gross interest; 80TTA/80TTB is claimed in deductions.

fields.label: Dividend income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Dividends are taxable in your hands even if TDS was deducted.

fields.label: Total other sources
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Verify portal OS total matches our computed head.

fields.label: Lottery / game winnings
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip unless you reported such income in our questionnaire.

ITR-2.title: Deductions and tax benefits
warnings: Capital gains tax rates are separate — do not offset CG with 80C.
New regime blocks most Chapter VI-A deductions except 80CCD(2).

fields.label: Section 80C
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Old regime only — capped at ₹1.5 lakh combined.

fields.label: Section 80D
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Health insurance premium deduction when old regime selected.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(1B)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Additional NPS up to ₹50,000 — separate from 80C cap.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(2)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Employer NPS allowed in both old and new regime.

fields.label: Section 80G
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Enter eligible donation amount after qualifying limits.

fields.label: Section 80U
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Select No when no disability deduction applies.

fields.label: Section 80TTA / 80TTB
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Deselect portal default if our computed savings-interest deduction is zero.

ITR-2.title: Tax computation
ITR-2.portalScreenTitle: Tax Paid and Verification → Part D
ITR-2.portalPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
warnings: Special-rate CG tax is added to slab tax — compare full Part D, not salary alone.
Refund and payable are mutually exclusive — verify sign matches our net payable.

fields.label: Gross total income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Sum of all heads before Chapter VI-A — must match before deductions.

fields.label: Total Chapter VI-A deductions
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Old-regime deductions reduce taxable income on portal.

fields.label: Net tax payable / refund
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Positive = pay more; negative = refund — use recommended regime result.

fields.label: TDS on salary
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Must reconcile with Form 16 Part-A and Form 26AS.

fields.label: TDS on other income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: FD, dividend, and broker TDS from 26AS.

fields.label: Advance / self-assessment tax
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Enter challan payments you made during the year.

fields.label: Surcharge on tax
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Leave blank unless our summary shows surcharge — rare below ₹50L income.

ITR-3.title: Business P&L (books of account)
warnings: Use audited or signed P&L figures — not bank credits alone.
Do not enter presumptive 44AD/44ADA percentages here — ITR-3 requires actual books.

fields.label: Gross receipts / turnover (books)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Total revenue per P&L before expenses.

fields.label: Total business expenses
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Allowable expenses from books — must support net profit.

fields.label: Net profit from business
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Receipts minus expenses per our P&L mapping.

fields.label: Net business income (head total)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Final business head after adjustments — verify on portal.

fields.label: Presumptive income u/s 44AD
fields.plainEnglishWhy: ITR-3 uses regular books, not presumptive turnover percentages.

fields.label: Presumptive income u/s 44ADA
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Professionals on presumptive scheme should file ITR-4, not ITR-3.

ITR-3.title: Capital gains (if applicable)
warnings: Many ITR-3 filers have no capital gains — skip entire schedule when all CG values are zero.
Separate business income from investment gains — wrong schedule causes defective return.

fields.label: STCG u/s 111A
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Enter when broker reported listed equity short-term gains.

fields.label: LTCG u/s 112A
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Taxable listed equity LTCG after annual exemption.

fields.label: Other capital gains
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Property, unlisted, or debt fund gains at applicable rates.

fields.label: Entire Schedule CG
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip all CG rows when our summary shows zero across STCG and LTCG.

ITR-3.title: Schedule 112A — equity sales
warnings: F&O traders: F&O profit goes in Schedule BP, not 112A — only delivery equity uses 112A.

fields.label: LTCG u/s 112A (net taxable)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Delivery equity LTCG after ₹1.25L exemption.

fields.label: STCG u/s 111A
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Delivery equity short-term gains at 15%.

ITR-3.title: Loss set-off & carry forward
screenTips: F&O losses are non-speculative business losses — different rules from equity STCL.
Intraday losses are speculative — can only offset intraday profits.
warnings: Carry forward only if prior year return was filed on time.
Verify CFL totals — you'll need them when filing next year.

fields.label: Current year loss set-off
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Auto-filled on portal after all schedules — cross-check with our engine.

fields.label: Brought-forward loss used
fields.plainEnglishWhy: From last year's CFL schedule — enter in BFLA first.

fields.label: STCL carried forward
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Equity short-term loss not set off this year.

fields.label: Business loss carried forward
fields.plainEnglishWhy: F&O or business loss remaining after set-off — 8 year carry.

fields.label: Unabsorbed depreciation
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Depreciation not used this year — carries forward indefinitely.

ITR-3.title: Salary (if mixed income)
ITR-3.portalPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
warnings: Business-only filers should skip salary entirely.
Side employment while running a business still needs Form 16 values entered.

fields.label: Gross salary u/s 17(1)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Enter when you also had salary alongside business income.

fields.label: Standard deduction u/s 16(ia)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Apply when salary head is active.

fields.label: Net salary income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Verify combined salary head matches our computation.

fields.label: Entire salary schedule
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip when gross salary is zero — business-only return.

ITR-3.title: Deductions and tax benefits
warnings: Business expenses belong in Schedule BP, not 80C — do not double-count.
New regime limits most deductions; confirm regime toggle first.

fields.label: Section 80C
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Personal investments — separate from business P&L expenses.

fields.label: Section 80D
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Health insurance for self and parents when old regime applies.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(1B)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Additional NPS contribution beyond 80C.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(2)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Employer NPS — allowed in both regimes.

fields.label: Section 80G
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Charitable donations after eligible limits.

fields.label: Section 80U
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Select No when disability deduction does not apply.

fields.label: Section 80TTA / 80TTB
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Deselect if savings-interest deduction is zero in our summary.

ITR-3.title: Balance sheet (Part A-BS)
warnings: LastMinute ITR does not compute balance sheet figures yet.
Consult your CA or use audited books — do not invent asset values.

fields.label: Fixed assets
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Not computed in our engine — enter from your books or skip if portal allows.

fields.label: Current assets (cash, debtors, stock)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Requires full books — outside current companion scope.

fields.label: Capital account / liabilities
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Balance sheet is mandatory for ITR-3 audit cases — use professional help.

fields.label: Schedule AL (assets & liabilities)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip unless income exceeds ₹50L threshold requiring AL disclosure.

ITR-3.title: Tax computation
ITR-3.portalScreenTitle: Tax Paid and Verification → Part D
ITR-3.portalPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
warnings: Business income plus CG may trigger advance-tax interest — verify Part D carefully.
Match TDS on professional receipts with 26AS before claiming credit.

fields.label: Gross total income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: All heads combined — salary, business, CG, and other sources.

fields.label: Total Chapter VI-A deductions
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Chapter VI-A total in old regime.

fields.label: Net tax payable / refund
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Final amount owed or refunded after all credits.

fields.label: TDS on salary
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Form 16 TDS when salary is present.

fields.label: TDS on other income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: 26AS credits on FD, contracts, and brokerage.

fields.label: Advance / self-assessment tax
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Challan payments for business advance tax.

ITR-4.title: Presumptive business (44AD / 44ADA)
warnings: Cash receipts above 5% of turnover disqualify presumptive scheme.
Turnover above ₹2Cr (business) or receipts above ₹50L (profession) needs ITR-3.

fields.label: Turnover / gross receipts
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Base figure for 44AD presumptive rate — match bank summary.

fields.label: Digital receipts percentage
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Higher digital share qualifies for 6% rate instead of 8% under 44AD.

fields.label: Presumptive income u/s 44AD
fields.plainEnglishWhy: 8% or 6% of turnover — our computed presumptive business profit.

fields.label: Gross professional receipts (44ADA)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Required when profession uses 44ADA instead of trade turnover.

fields.label: Presumptive income u/s 44ADA
fields.plainEnglishWhy: 50% of professional receipts when 44ADA applies.

fields.label: Net business income (head total)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Final business head after presumptive computation.

fields.label: Detailed P&L / expense breakup
fields.plainEnglishWhy: ITR-4 presumptive scheme does not require expense schedules.

fields.label: 44AE (goods carriage)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Not supported in our engine yet — consult CA if you operate goods carriages.

ITR-4.title: Goods carriage (44AE)
warnings: LastMinute does not compute 44AE yet — use portal calculator or consult your CA.
More than 10 goods carriages requires ITR-3 with books of account.

fields.label: Number of goods carriages owned
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Each vehicle gets a separate row on the portal.

fields.label: Tonnage capacity (GVW from RC)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Portal uses tonnage to calculate presumptive income per km.

fields.label: Presumptive income u/s 44AE (total)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Auto-calculated on portal — verify against your records.

fields.label: Skip 44AE (shop/profession only)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip when you only use 44AD or 44ADA presumptive schemes.

ITR-4.title: Salary (if mixed income)
ITR-4.portalPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
warnings: ITR-4 allows salary plus presumptive business — enter salary only if Form 16 exists.
Do not skip salary when employer TDS appears in 26AS.

fields.label: Gross salary u/s 17(1)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Salaried side income alongside presumptive business.

fields.label: Exempt allowances u/s 10
fields.plainEnglishWhy: HRA and LTA exemptions reduce taxable salary.

fields.label: Standard deduction u/s 16(ia)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Mandatory when salary schedule is active.

fields.label: Net salary income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Verify portal salary head matches our total.

fields.label: Entire salary schedule
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Skip all salary fields when you had no employment income.

ITR-4.title: Deductions and tax benefits
warnings: Business presumptive income is not an 80C investment — keep schedules separate.
New regime blocks most deductions except 80CCD(2).

fields.label: Section 80C
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Personal tax-saving investments capped at ₹1.5 lakh.

fields.label: Section 80D
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Health insurance premiums when old regime selected.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(1B)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Extra NPS deduction beyond 80C.

fields.label: Section 80CCD(2)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Employer NPS — available in both regimes.

fields.label: Section 80G
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Eligible charitable donations.

fields.label: Section 80U
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Select No when disability deduction is not claimed.

fields.label: Section 80TTA / 80TTB
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Deselect portal default when our savings-interest deduction is zero.

ITR-4.title: Tax computation
ITR-4.portalScreenTitle: Tax Paid and Verification → Part D
ITR-4.portalPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
warnings: Presumptive income is fully taxable — do not subtract business expenses again in Part D.
Verify 26AS TDS on both salary and business receipts.

fields.label: Gross total income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Salary plus presumptive business plus other heads.

fields.label: Total Chapter VI-A deductions
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Old-regime deductions before taxable income.

fields.label: Net tax payable / refund
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Amount still due or refundable after TDS credits.

fields.label: TDS on salary
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Employer TDS when salary is present.

fields.label: TDS on other income
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Bank and client TDS from 26AS.

fields.label: Advance / self-assessment tax
fields.plainEnglishWhy: Direct tax payments via challan.

fields.label: Schedule CG (capital gains)
fields.plainEnglishWhy: ITR-4 cannot report capital gains — upgrade to ITR-2 if you sold shares or property.
